tests.journey: A new user submits their email on the Analyze page to begin registration and receives a 6-digit verification code.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits their email to register

tests.journey: A user who has received a verification code submits the correct code and is granted access to their account.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User has received a verification code
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits the correct verification code
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: User is logged in and sees their account

tests.journey: A user who has received a verification code submits an incorrect code and is shown a verification error.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User has received a verification code
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User submits an incorrect verification code

tests.journey: An authenticated user logs out and is returned to the home page in an unauthenticated state.

test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: User is returned to the home page unauthenticated

tests.journey: An authenticated user permanently deletes their account, after which the account no longer exists in the system.
